# `ta.vwma`

> **Stability:** experimental
> **Since:** 0.2

Volume-weighted moving average ‚Äî `Œ£ source[t‚àíj] ¬∑ volume[t‚àíj]` over
the trailing `length` bars divided by `Œ£ volume[t‚àíj]`. NaN volume
slots are treated as `0` (matches `vwmaFloat64`'s null-coalesce
semantics). A NaN source anywhere inside the window emits `NaN`;
a window whose total volume is `0` emits `NaN` (the ratio is
undefined). Reads bar volume from `RuntimeContext.stream.bar.volume`.

## Formula

out[t] = (Œ£_{j=0..length-1} source[t ‚àí j] ¬∑ volume[t ‚àí j])
       / (Œ£_{j=0..length-1} volume[t ‚àí j])
      ;  NaN when the denominator is 0.

## Warmup

length ‚àí 1

## Signature

```ts
function vwma(slotId: string, source: ScalarOrSeries, length: number, _opts?: VwmaOpts): Series<number>;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite ‚Äî script authors call `ta.<id>(...)` without it._

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `slotId` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `source` | `ScalarOrSeries` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `length` | `number` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `_opts` | `VwmaOpts` | (optional) | ‚Äî |

## Returns

`Series<number>`
